entities.name: RICE

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The measure of agricultural productivity used for policy and insurance assessment

entities.description: The specific district in Telangana where the field-based study was conducted

entities.name: TELANGANA
entities.description: The Indian state where the research was carried out

entities.name: BIOTIC AND ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Environmental and biological factors that cause crop insurance losses

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: A physiological measure used as a primary criterion for integrating remote sensing and crop models

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Technology used to map crops and estimate yield via satellite data

entities.name: CROP SIMULATION MODELS
entities.description: Computational tools used to predict crop yields based on management and environmental data

entities.name: SENTINEL-2 SATELLITE DATA
entities.description: Satellite-derived data used for mapping the rice crop

entities.name: GROUND DATA
entities.description: Field-collected data used to validate crop mapping and model inputs

entities.name: MACHINE LEARNING ALGORITHMS
entities.description: Computational methods used to map rice crops with high accuracy

entities.name: DSSAT TOOL
entities.description: A specific crop simulation model used to predict rice yields

entities.name: NORMALIZED DIFFERENCE VEGETATION INDEX
entities.description: A vegetation index used as a proxy for leaf area index

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: CROP INSURANCE LOSSES
entities.description: Financial losses in agriculture assessed through yield estimation
